titleStmt.title: SII 29.184: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 184. (A.R. No. B. 113 of 1961-62.) BŌDHAN, BODHAN TALUK, NIZAMABAD DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar [No. 2] on top of the Fort to the north of the old village.

The record is engraved on four sides of the pillar. This nishidhige inscription has the praśasti of several Jaina munis. It states that Gaṇḍavīmukta bhaṭṭāraka, disciple of Nāganandi bhaṭṭāraka who was himself the disciple of Nandi-siddhāntadēva attained samādhi by sanyasana vidhi at Bahudhānya-nagara.

The date is mentioned in chronogram on the third face and letters on the fourth face of the pillar with one difference. (1) Pāvaka-rasa-nidhi Samkhya (Śaka 963) Vṟisha, Māgha Śu. 10. (2) Śaka 963 Vṟisha, Pushya, Śu. 10.
The difference of one month may be explained as under.

The Jaina muni Gaṇḍavimukta bhaṭṭāraka took the owe of sanyasanavidhi on Śukla dashami [Śu. 10] of the month Pushya and attained samādhi on Māgha, Śu. 10 of Śaka 963, V®sha. The last ten lines of the text provide proper information to this effect. As a result it is clear that the muni performed the vrata for one full month to attain samadhi.
The given two tithis correspond to: (1) 1042 A.D., January, 4 [Monday]. (2) 1041 A.D., December 5, [Saturday].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rāgadvēṣa bhayāsraśrayō
ndriya kaṣāyāṣṭaupha
daṇḍīṣu māyāgatatya
di vidōṣa saṁharaṇa
ṣaḍtriṁ sadguṇādya
ṣṭa saṁyōgādhiṣṭi
ta nāganandiya
ti pa�ṣyarā
cāra saṁbhōgargaṇḍaviThe letterga is written in small size.
mukta dēvaramaḷa
r vijñānatatvārṇna
var .

munipati kuḷa dīparssajjanā
bōdhicandrō duritatimi
rahāra bhavya padmāva bōdhi
nihata madanamallōmu
kta mātsaryya bhāvō jaya
tujagati mānyōnāsanandi
munīndraḥ . tasyājani pra
baḷakarmmaghanānda kā
ra vēdēpaṭuḥ paṭumatiḥ
paramāgamanyaḥ vātsa
lyavānguṇa nidhirggaṇa
pōṣakōnsaṁśśiṣyastapoṁ
bunidhi gaṇḍavimukta
sūri .

bhādrakanripanabdagaṇaṁ pāvaka
rasanidhi saṁkhyasandu vriṣa
sāmābdaṁ prakaṭise
māghasita daśami
kūḍibare nāganandi mu
ni paraśiṣyar . muni
gaṇa mukhyarbbahudhānya
nagaradoḷe sakaḷa sā
dhugaḷa sannidhiyoḷ
janmanavanu smariyisu
tuṁ dinatrayaṁnōntana
rghyaratnatrayamaṁ
bhuvana prastutyarārādhi
se samanikāyarssaṁyamā
bodhigaḷ gaṇḍavimuktācāryya
varyyartṛdaśakudhara dhairya
prasannāṁtaraṁgar . bhavadārttha
jātatīkṣaṇakrakacaradhigatā
śēṣatatvarvvaca śrīyu
vati citrēsvammāna dharmma
ḍamadavarddēvalōkakke
sandar .

svastiyamaniyamasvādhyā
yamōnānuṣṭhānaparāya
ru traividya vidhigaḷu
trikāḷa yōgigaḷumappa
śrī nandi siddhāntadēvara
śiṣyarappa śrīmanmaṁgayya
maladavāga nandibhaṭṭāraka
ra śirṣya śrī madgaṇḍa
vimuktabhaṭṭārakar saka
variṣa voṁbhainū
ṟaAṟuvattamūṟa
neya vṛṣa saṁvatsarada
puṣya māsada sukla pakṣa
da daśami dinatraya sanyā
sanaṁgeydu ratnatrayamaṁ
sādhisi samādhi paḍedu sva
rggastarādar .
Digital edition of SII 29.184 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
